evals.prompt: Prepare the sprint review security section: SAST passed with 2 accepted mediums, DAST clean, Snyk found 1 critical CVE we patched, coverage 84%, completed stories SEC-12 (rate limiting) and SEC-15 (input validation).
evals.expected_output: A one-page green build report with the pipeline table, completed stories with demoable outcomes, debt position, and 30-second demo suggestions per story.
expectations: Pipeline table covers SAST/DAST/dependency/test stages with the provided data
Each completed story gets a concrete demo suggestion
Accepted medium findings are shown transparently with acceptance reference

evals.prompt: Our DAST stage failed this sprint with one High finding we haven't fixed. How do we present this at sprint review?
evals.expected_output: A report that shows the red stage honestly with cause and remediation plan, rather than hiding it; framing guidance for stakeholder trust.
expectations: Does not advise hiding or downplaying the failure
Includes cause, owner, and remediation timeline

evals.prompt: Give me security-angle retro prompts for this sprint - we had two hotfixes for issues the pipeline missed.
evals.expected_output: Retro prompts focused on which gate could have caught the issues, capacity reserve reality, and follow-up actions feeding the backlog.
expectations: Prompts ask which pipeline gate would have caught each hotfix issue
Connects findings to next sprint's backlog
